gaps.description: Hardware detector — detect GPU/memory/arch/OS (detector/hardware.js)
Remote profiles — GitHub raw URL with 4-tier fallback: fresh cache → remote fetch → expired cache → built-in default.json (detector/profiles.js)
Ollama integration — auto-install + model pull (detector/ollama.js)
Basic HTTP service — REST API with chat/transcribe/synthesize/status/config endpoints (server/api.js)
Web UI (minimal) — Vue 3 + Vite client with text chat (src/ui/client/)
One-click install — npx agentic-service via bin/agentic-service.js + src/cli/setup.js
STT integration — adaptive provider selection: sensevoice for apple-silicon, whisper for nvidia, cloud fallback for cpu-only (runtime/stt.js)
TTS integration — adaptive provider selection: kokoro/piper local, cloud fallback (runtime/tts.js)
Web UI voice — useVAD.js + useWakeWord.js composables for hold-to-talk and wake word
Wake word detection — startWakeWordPipeline() with node-record-lpcm16 + energy-based VAD (runtime/sense.js)
Multi-device WebSocket — device registration, heartbeat, joinSession/broadcastSession with brainState (server/hub.js)
Visual perception — sense.js exports both detect(frame) returning {faces, gestures, objects} and event-based start()/stop() loop
Device tools — sendCommand() supports capture/speak/display with capture timeout handling (server/hub.js)
Admin panel — static files served from dist/admin at /admin; sources device list from GET /api/status and config from GET /api/config
Cloud fallback — llm.js tries Ollama first, falls back to cloud on error; uses profile.fallback.provider config
gaps.detail: Fallback triggers on Ollama error only, not on timeout >5s or 3 consecutive errors as PRD specifies; no auto-restore after 60s probe

gaps.description: Config hot-reload — watchProfiles() polls every 30s with ETag-based conditional fetching (detector/profiles.js)
Docker deployment — Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml + setup.sh in install/ directory
HTTPS — httpsServer.js + cert.js functional; LAN tunnel (tunnel.js) with ngrok/cloudflared support
Server-side VAD — energy-based VAD in vad.js + hub.js isSilent()
Voice latency <2s — profiler.js measurePipeline() enforces 2000ms budget; /api/voice logs latency and warns on exceed
CPU profiling — profiler.js with startMark/endMark/getMetrics; integrated into stt.js, tts.js, llm.js
Memory module — memory.js with search(query, topK) and add() using agentic-store + agentic-embed vector embedding
store.js API — exports both del() and delete() alias; resolves naming discrepancy
hub.js heartbeat timeout — 60s (60000ms) matching canonical value
Documentation + README — complete user docs with install, API reference, architecture, troubleshooting
mDNS/Bonjour for .local hostname discovery — not implemented; only raw LAN IP display available
Root docker-compose.yml missing OLLAMA_HOST env var — required for containerized Ollama connectivity
Root docker-compose.yml missing ./data volume mount — install/docker-compose.yml mounts config volume but root does not
Test suite — 59 of 206 test files failing (106 of 905 tests); failures in STT/TTS due to missing OPENAI_API_KEY
